From his 25th year, the native
will enjoy good fortune. From his 28th year, his fortune will be much better.
There will be a very adverse period between his 27th and 38th year. Once
again his fortunes will take a better tum from his 39th year. During his 40th
year, he will obtain a prominent part in a new business concern. This will
prove beneficial to the native.
